office: Office of Digital Operations & Situational Awareness

frameworks.title: Aetheria Operational Awareness Framework
frameworks.summary: Comprehensive operational awareness framework covering platform reliability, incident response, and threat monitoring for all Aetheria infrastructure.

frameworks.title: Critical Infrastructure Protection Standard
frameworks.summary: Security standards for node operators, consensus mechanisms, and critical digital infrastructure components.

frameworks.title: Situational Awareness & Threat Monitoring Protocol
frameworks.summary: Structured protocol for continuous monitoring, threat assessment, and early warning across ministries, node operators, and digital infrastructure.

frameworks.title: Supply Chain Security Framework
frameworks.summary: Framework for securing software supply chain including dependency verification, build integrity, and distribution channel protection.

incidents.title: CVE-2026-XXXX Consensus Layer Vulnerability
incidents.summary: Security vulnerability in consensus layer requiring emergency patch deployment across all active nodes. Successfully mitigated within 72 hours.

incidents.title: Distributed Denial of Service Attack on Registry
incidents.summary: Coordinated DDoS attempt on citizen registry infrastructure. Mitigated through traffic filtering and redundant gateway activation within 4 hours.

incidents.title: Social Engineering Campaign Targeting Node Operators
incidents.summary: Coordinated phishing campaign targeting node operators with fake security update notifications. Investigation ongoing.

incidents.title: Treasury Query Latency Degradation
incidents.summary: Brief latency spike on treasury query endpoints caused by cache invalidation bug. Hotfix deployed within 90 minutes.

protocols.title: Incident Response Playbook
protocols.summary: Standardized incident response procedures including containment, eradication, recovery, and lessons-learned phases.

protocols.title: Platform & Infrastructure Defense Management
protocols.summary: Continuous monitoring and adjustment of platform and infrastructure defensive posture including firewall rules, access controls, and anomaly detection.

protocols.title: Supply Chain Security Framework
protocols.summary: Framework for securing software supply chain including dependency verification, build integrity, and distribution channel protection.

protocols.title: Node Operator Security Baseline
protocols.summary: Minimum security requirements for node operators including key storage, update hygiene, and incident reporting obligations.

pillars.title: Operational Awareness
pillars.summary: Real-time threat monitoring, incident correlation, and automated alerting.

pillars.title: Resilient Architecture
pillars.summary: Distributed systems with graceful degradation and rapid recovery.

pillars.title: Citizen Protection
pillars.summary: Identity safeguards, fraud detection, and privacy-preserving security.
